prerequisites: A Paperform account on the Standard or Business plan (or the Papersign API plan), which is required for API access.
An API key generated from your Paperform account, used to populate the required api_key field.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a Paperform API key. Generate the key on your Paperform account's developer page, then provide it in the connector's api_key field. Paperform passes it in requests as an Authorization: Bearer <token> header.

setupSteps.title: Confirm your plan supports API access
setupSteps.body: Paperform API access requires a Standard or Business plan, or the Papersign API plan. Verify your subscription before generating a key.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Paperform and open your account developer page at https://paperform.co/account/developer to generate an API key. This key is sent as Authorization: Bearer <token> on every API request.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the generated key into the required api_key field. This is the only required configuration field for this source.
